mapper.sql: id, conversation_id, user_id, user_message_id, assistant_message_id, status, active_agent, dify_task_id, workflow_run_id, tool_token_hash, tool_token_expire_at, last_sequence, token_count, started_at, finished_at, error_code, error_message, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into agent_run(conversation_id, user_id, user_message_id, assistant_message_id, status, active_agent, dify_task_id, workflow_run_id, tool_token_hash, tool_token_expire_at, last_sequence, token_count, started_at, finished_at, error_code, error_message, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values(#{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{userMessageId}, #{assistantMessageId}, #{status}, #{activeAgent}, #{difyTaskId}, #{workflowRunId}, #{toolTokenHash}, #{toolTokenExpireAt}, #{lastSequence}, #{tokenCount}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select from agent_run where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
select from agent_run where id = #{id} for update
select from agent_run where conversation_id = #{conversationId} order by id desc
mapper.update: update agent_run set user_message_id=#{userMessageId}, assistant_message_id=#{assistantMessageId}, status=#{status}, active_agent=#{activeAgent}, dify_task_id=#{difyTaskId}, workflow_run_id=#{workflowRunId}, tool_token_hash=#{toolTokenHash}, tool_token_expire_at=#{toolTokenExpireAt}, last_sequence=#{lastSequence}, token_count=#{tokenCount}, started_at=#{startedAt}, finished_at=#{finishedAt}, error_code=#{errorCode}, error_message=#{errorMessage}, update_by=#{updateBy}, update_time=sysdate() where id=#{id}
